name: Email Data Leak Prevention
description: Prevents sensitive data leakage via email. Riggs AI analyzes outbound email alerts from DLP systems to determine if attachments or body content contain sensitive data (PII, credentials, confidential documents). Confirmed violations trigger email quarantine, sender notification, and manager escalation. Designed for Tier 1/2 SOC analysts handling email-based DLP policy violations.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Microsoft Graph
required_integrations.reason: Quarantine flagged email and retrieve attachment metadata

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify sender and SOC team of DLP violation

data.title: Email DLP Alert Received
data.summary: Triggers on outbound email DLP policy violations

data.title: AI Attachment & Content Analysis
data.summary: Riggs AI analyzes email attachments and body for sensitive data patterns

config.custom_instructions: Analyze email attachments and body content for PII, credentials, financial data, or classified information. Assess whether this is intentional exfiltration or accidental.

data.title: Contains Sensitive Data?
data.summary: Branch based on whether email contains confirmed sensitive data

data.title: Quarantine Email
data.summary: Move the flagged email to quarantine to prevent delivery

params.reason: DLP violation — sensitive data detected in outbound email

data.title: Intentional Exfiltration?
data.summary: Determine if the data leak appears intentional vs accidental

data.title: Escalate to Manager & Security
data.summary: Escalate intentional data leak to user's manager and security team

data.title: Notify Sender — Policy Violation
data.summary: Inform sender their email was quarantined due to DLP policy

config.message: Your outbound email to {{$.trigger.alert.recipient}} was quarantined because it contains sensitive data ({{$.nodes.edl-2.result.data_classification}}). Please remove sensitive content and resend, or contact your manager for an exception. Subject: {{$.trigger.alert.subject}}

data.title: Close Alert — Clean Email
data.summary: No sensitive data found, close alert as false positive

config.note: Email DLP alert reviewed by Riggs AI. Verdict: {{$.nodes.edl-2.result.verdict}}. No sensitive data confirmed in attachments or body. Closing as false positive.

data.title: Playbook Complete
data.summary: Email data leak prevention workflow finished

config.summary: Email data leak prevention workflow completed
